prestazioni: Engine swap to a **VAZ-21214-20** (1.7L, 83mm bore, 80mm stroke) with a **Garrett GT2860RS** turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) running 1.2 bar of boost, paired with a **Bosch 0280158001** 3-bar MAP sensor and a **Megasquirt MS3Pro EVO** standalone ECU tuned for 180+ HP on 98 RON fuel with a **Nissan SR20DET** 440cc injectors and a **Walbro 255 LPH** fuel pump

Full **VAZ-21213** drivetrain reinforcement: **Quattro Clutch 240mm twin-disc clutch** with a **VAZ-2101** lightweight flywheel, **Rzeppa CV joints** from a **Lada 4x4 Urban**, and a **GKN-Spicer** heavy-duty front driveshaft with **SKF VKJA5701** constant velocity joints for 30% increased torque capacity

Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins TTX22M** 2-way adjustable coilovers (100mm travel, 400lb/in springs) and **Polyurethane bushings** from **SuperPro** (part #SPF0117K) for the front A-arms, paired with **Bilstein B8 46-207742** rear shocks and a **TeraFlex** 2.5" lift kit with **Heavy Duty Control Arms** (part #1051000) for 33" tire clearance
estetica: Custom **Rocket Bunny RB-NIVA** widebody kit (hand-rolled steel fenders, 50mm extended flares) with **Carbon Miata** front splitter and **Seibon** carbon fiber hood (VAZ-21214-specific mold, 30% weight reduction)

Full **Lada Niva Legend 4x4** interior retrofit: **Recaro SRD** seats (VAZ-2121 mounting brackets), **Momo Mod.78** steering wheel with a **NRG Innovations** quick-release hub, and a **Defi BF** 4-gauge digital boost/fuel pressure dashboard integrated into the **VAZ-2107** instrument cluster housing

Exterior lighting upgrade: **Hella Rallye 4000** 7" round headlights with **Cibie Oscar** H1 bulbs, **Hella Micro DE** fog lights (VAZ-21214 bumper cutouts), and **Osram Night Breaker Laser** H7 bulbs for high beams, paired with **Rally Innovations** LED taillight conversion (VAZ-2105 lens pattern)
